failure_modes.mode: Thermal degradation of deep eutectic solvent
failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG mixture decomposes at T > 130°C with prolonged exposure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant temperature monitoring with alarm at 125°C

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction products or solvent crystallization in narrow 0.75mm bore
failure_modes.mitigation: Split into 3x shorter coils with intermediate monitoring points

failure_modes.mode: Pump seal failure with viscous DES
failure_modes.cause: High viscosity TBAB/EG mixture (η ≈ 50 cP at 120°C) causes seal wear at low flow rate
failure_modes.mitigation: Use HPLC pump rated for viscous solvents with ceramic plungers

single_points_of_failure: Temperature controller failure — runaway reaction risk
Single 19m coil — complete blockage stops production
validation_experiments: Heat TBAB/EG mixture at 120°C for 8 hours; analyze by NMR for decomposition products
Pump blank DES through 0.75mm × 6m coil at Q=0.07 mL/min for 24h; monitor pressure drift
Thermal stress test: ramp temperature 120→140°C over 2h while monitoring product quality
